block_01: We would like to kindly remind you that any new “buy” positions on cryptocurrencies (‘’cryptos’’) entered on or following the 1st of January 2019 will be treated as CFDs. In relation to these new long positions on CFD cryptos, the Company reserves the right to charge a swap fee between -0.13 to 0.25 of the face value of the position for keeping a position open overnight.
block_02: Also, we would like to inform you that beginning on January 1st, 2019, there will be a change implemented in the number of cryptocurrency multipliers on the IQ Option platform. Consequently, on and following the 1st of January 2019 only the x2 multiplier will be available for cryptocurrency trading.
block_03: Lastly, all pending orders concerning cryptos will be cancelled by the Company on the 29th of December 2018. You may place a crypto pending order on the 30th of December 2018 and/or on the 31st of December 2018 but please be informed that if your pending order is not executed until the 31st of December 2018 then it will not be executed at all.
